---
title: "admiral - ADaM Dataset Creation"
---

## Overview

`admiral` (ADaM in R Asset Library) is a pharmaverse package for creating ADaM datasets in R.

## Installation

```{r}
#| eval: false
install.packages("admiral")
```

## Basic Example

```{r}
#| eval: false
library(admiral)
library(dplyr)

# Example: Derive treatment variables
# adsl <- dm %>%
#   derive_vars_merged(
#     dataset_add = ex,
#     by_vars = exprs(STUDYID, USUBJID),
#     new_vars = exprs(TRTSDT = EXSTDTC)
#   )
```

## Resources

- [admiral documentation](https://pharmaverse.github.io/admiral/)
- [admiral templates](https://pharmaverse.github.io/admiral/articles/admiral.html)

## Experiments

*Add your experiments here...*
